name: trademe-listing-drafter
description: Drafts a complete Trade Me marketplace listing from photos and a one-line description.
longDescription: You have a thing to sell. You have photos. You don't have the time to write a title that ranks, a description that converts, and choose the right category. This skill takes your photos and a one-line description and produces a full listing — title, category suggestion, condition wording, key spec bullets, dimensions/measurements if extractable from photos, and the description body. NZ tone, Trade Me-appropriate categories, no clickbait. Does not list. You paste into Trade Me.
